title: Shyaway Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Shyaway Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Shyaway Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shyaway Digital Technologies:
Shyaway Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shyaway Digital Technologies!
